passkeysLastWarning: The last passkey cannot be deleted
passkeysLinkSentDescription: We sent a link to your registered email address. Open the email link on a new device and register a passkey. Do not share the link with third parties.
passkeysEnableNewDevice: Enable login on a new device
recoveryDescription: Enter your registered email address. We will send you a recovery link.
recoveryConsumeDoneDescription: Use the button below to register a passkey and enable login on this device.
recoveryConsumeInvalidTitle: Recovery link could not be verified
recoveryConsumeInvalidDescription: The recovery link is invalid or expired. Please try again.
recoveryRegisterNewDeviceTitle: Register a passkey on a new device
recoveryRegisterNewDeviceDescription: Register a passkey on the new device so you can sign in.
recoveryRegisterReissueDescription: Register a new passkey to restore access to your account.
accountSuspendedDescription1: For safety, we ended this account's session. Please contact support if you need the restriction lifted or more details.
accountSuspendedDescription2: When you contact support, include the registered email address and the time this screen appeared.
sessionExpiredDescription: For security, your session ended. Please sign in again.
deviceLinkSendFailed: Failed to send login enablement link.
passkeyLastDeleteBlocked: The last passkey cannot be deleted.
passkeyOperationCancelledOrTimedOut: Passkey operation was cancelled or timed out. Please try again.
passkeyOperationInvalidState: This device already has a passkey registered, or no passkey was found.
passkeyOperationNotSupported: This browser or device does not support passkeys.
passkeyOperationSecurityError: A security error occurred. Please reload the page and try again.
passkeyOperationAborted: Passkey operation was aborted. Please try again.
passkeyOperationBrowserUnsupported: Could not complete passkey operation. Please check if your browser supports passkeys.
passkeyOperationFailed: Passkey operation failed. Please try again later.
